IERC20","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Seller registers zone prices on-chain in USDC units (6 decimals).         e.g. 15_000_000 = $15.00 USDC.         Buyer approves the contract to spend USDC, then calls createOrder().         Zone labels are bytes32 for gas efficiency.         Frontend should use ethers.encodeBytes32String(\"lekki\") before calling.         Delivery confirmation flow:           1. Seller delivers and generates an OTP off-chain.           2. Seller calls markDelivered(), storing keccak256(otp) on-chain.           3. Seller sends the raw OTP to the buyer out-of-band (SMS / app notification).           4. Buyer calls confirmDelivery() with the raw OTP.           5. Status moves to Completed and a 2-hour dispute window starts.           6a. If buyer disputes within 2 hours \u2192 owner investigates via resolveDispute().           6b. If no dispute after 2 hours \u2192 anyone calls releaseFunds() to pay the seller.               The frontend should call this automatically on the seller's behalf.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"confirmDelivery(uint256,string)":{"details":"Funds stay locked until releaseFunds() is called after the window elapses.","params":{"orderId":"The order to confirm","otp":"The raw OTP string shared by the seller out-of-band"}},"disputeOrder(uint256)":{"params":{"orderId":"A Completed order still within the dispute window"}},"markDelivered(uint256,bytes32)":{"params":{"orderId":"The order to mark delivered","otpHash":"keccak256(abi.encodePacked(otp)) \u2014 generated off-chain by seller.                  Raw OTP shared with buyer out-of-band (SMS / app notification)."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"releaseFunds(uint256)":{"params":{"orderId":"A Completed order whose dispute window has passed"}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"resolveDispute(uint256,bool)":{"params":{"orderId":"The disputed order to resolve","refundBuyer":"true = refund buyer, false = release to seller"}},"setAvailability(bool)":{"details":"Sellers default to unavailable (false). Must call setAvailability(true)         before buyers can place orders against them.","params":{"available":"true = open for orders, false = not accepting orders"}},"setPrice(bytes32,uint256)":{"params":{"usdcAmount":"Price in USDC units (6 decimals) e.g. 15_000_000 = $15.00","zone":"bytes32 zone label e.g. ethers.encodeBytes32String(\"lekki\")"}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."}},"stateVariables":{"orders":{"details":"orderId \u2192 Order"},"otpAttempts":{"details":"orderId \u2192 number of failed OTP attempts by buyer"},"sellerAvailable":{"details":"seller \u2192 true if accepting new orders.      Defaults to false \u2014 seller must explicitly go online before orders can be placed."},"sellerPrices":{"details":"seller \u2192 zone (bytes32) \u2192 price in USDC units (6 decimals)      e.g. 15_000_000 = $15.00"}},"title":"EscrowCore \u2014 DispatchPay v1","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"confirmDelivery(uint256,string)":{"notice":"Buyer submits the OTP to confirm receipt. the dispute window, 0 if elapsed or not Completed."},"getPrice(address,bytes32)":{"notice":"Returns the USDC price a seller has set for a zone."},"markDelivered(uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Seller confirmDelivery(uint256,string).details: Funds stay locked until releaseFunds() is called after the window elapses.

params.otp: The raw OTP string shared by the seller out-of-band

params.orderId: A Completed order still within the dispute window

params.otpHash: keccak256(abi.encodePacked(otp)) — generated off-chain by seller.                  Raw OTP shared with buyer out-of-band (SMS / app notification).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.orderId: A Completed order whose dispute window has passed

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.refundBuyer: true = refund buyer, false = release to seller

setAvailability(bool).details: Sellers default to unavailable (false). Must call setAvailability(true)         before buyers can place orders against them.

params.available: true = open for orders, false = not accepting orders

params.usdcAmount: Price in USDC units (6 decimals) e.g. 15_000_000 = $15.00

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

confirmDelivery(uint256,string).notice: Buyer submits the OTP to confirm receipt. Starts the 2-hour dispute window.

disputeOrder(uint256).notice: Buyer disputes a completed order within the 2-hour window.

disputeTimeLeft(uint256).notice: Returns seconds remaining in the dispute window, 0 if elapsed or not Completed.

getPrice(address,bytes32).notice: Returns the USDC price a seller has set for a zone.

markDelivered(uint256,bytes32).notice: Seller marks an order as delivered and stores the hashed OTP.

releaseFunds(uint256).notice: Releases funds to the seller after the dispute window has passed with no dispute.

resolveDispute(uint256,bool).notice: Owner resolves a disputed order, sending USDC to either buyer or seller.

setAvailability(bool).notice: Seller toggles their availability to accept new orders.

setPrice(bytes32,uint256).notice: Seller sets or updates a delivery price for a location zone.

usdc().notice: The USDC token contract used for all payments.
